name: ePrivacy Directive
description: EU ePrivacy Directive (Directive 2002/58/EC, as amended) — governs the processing of personal data and protection of privacy in electronic communications, including cookies, traffic data, and direct marketing. Cookie consent rules derive from this directive.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud-hosted analytics, advertising, and tracking technologies subject to ePrivacy consent rules.
relationToAISecurity: AI systems using cookies/tracking for behavioral inference subject to consent rules.

license.notes: EU legislation published in OJEU. Reuse permitted under EUR-Lex terms; attribution expected.

lifecycle.notes: Adopted 2002; amended 2009 and proposed ePrivacy Regulation pending.

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source acquisition + extraction TODO.
